author: anon-295fd0bb
content: Revised plan: Given 186 existing CLI tests, reduce from 11 agents to 8. Drop agents 2-4 (CLI Issue CRUD, Issue Org, Comments+Sessions) — already well covered. Keep: 1) Harness foundation + init edge cases, 2) CLI data management (import/export roundtrip, knowledge edge cases), 3) CLI infrastructure (config, sync, integrity, compact, prune), 4) CLI tooling (cpitd, workflow, context, style, design_doc, mc), 5) Server API + WebSocket, 6) Coordination (events, compaction, locks, push retry), 7) Adversarial (boundary, corruption, injection, concurrency), 8) TUI + proptest extensions.
